zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Umfreville於大約1161年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德普盧多時，她的父親Odinel d'Umfraville II37歲，母親Aveline Lucy42歲。她和William Bertram Baron of Mitford至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1253年8月20日在英國諾圖波藍德可哈姆享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Umfreville于大约1161年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德普盧多时，她的父亲Odinel d'Umfraville II37岁，母亲Aveline Lucy42岁。她和William Bertram Baron of Mitford至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1253年8月20日在英国諾圖波藍德可哈姆享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Umfreville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Umfreville was born about 1161, in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Odinel d'Umfraville II, was 37 and her mother, Aveline Lucy, was 42. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with William Bertram Baron of Mitford. She died on 20 August 1253, in Hexham, Northumberland, England, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Umfreville est née environ 1161, à Prudhoe, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Odinel d'Umfraville II, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Aveline Lucy, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec William Bertram Baron of Mitford. Elle est décédée le 20 août 1253, à Hexham, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Umfreville um 1161 in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Odinel d'Umfraville II 37 und ihre Mutter Aveline Lucy 42. Sie hatte mit William Bertram Baron of Mitford mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. August 1253 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Hexham, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Umfreville è nata il circa 1161 nel Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Odinel d'Umfraville II, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Aveline Lucy, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con William Bertram Baron of Mitford. Morì il 20 agosto 1253, nel Hexham, Northumberland, England, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Umfrevilleが約1161年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドプルドhオで生まれた時，父Odinel d'Umfraville IIは37歳，母Aveline Lucyは42歳であった。彼女はWilliam Bertram Baron of Mitfordとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1253年8月20日にイギリスノースウンバーランドヘクスハムで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Umfreville(이)가 대략 1161년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 프루드호에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Odinel d'Umfraville II(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aveline Lucy(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 William Bertram Baron of Mitford(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1253년 8월 20일 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤스함에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Umfreville nasceu aproximadamente 1161, em Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Odinel d'Umfraville II, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Aveline Lucy, tinha 42 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com William Bertram Baron of Mitford. Ela faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1253, em Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Umfreville родилась около 1161 г. в местности прудхо, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Odinel d'Umfraville II было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Aveline Lucy, 42. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от William Bertram Baron of Mitford. Она умерла 20 августа 1253 г. в местности хексхам, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Umfreville nació aproximadamente 1161, en Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Odinel d'Umfraville II, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Aveline Lucy, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con William Bertram Baron of Mitford. Murió el 20 de agosto de 1253, en Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 93 años.
